hero.eyebrow: Urban spa · Rio de Janeiro & Niterói
hero.title: A sensory pause
hero.subtitle: to slow the body and quiet the mind.
hero.description: Massages, sensory journeys and body protocols with natural ingredients — nature in your day.

home.introText: For 24 years we have been bringing the best of nature into your everyday life. Each experience is designed to balance body, mind and spirit — a refuge of serenity within the city's rhythm.
home.experiencesText: From the full sensory journey to a focused therapy, every protocol blends mindful touch, exclusive essential oils and natural products.
home.pathsEyebrow: How we can care for you
home.pathsText: Whatever your moment is — we have an experience designed for it.
home.journeysText: To gift, share an experience as a couple or reserve a special moment.
home.therapiesText: For those who want to relax, slow down and quiet a busy mind — and also for sports therapy, muscle tension, a tired body and recovery from training or an intense routine.
home.leadTitle: Let us take care of you
home.leadText: Leave your details and our team will find the ideal experience, time and location for you.
home.unitsTitle: Five addresses in Rio and Niterói
home.ctaTitle: Your body is asking for a pause
home.ctaText: Choose your experience. We take care of the rest.
home.philosophyText: Exclusive formulations with natural ingredients from our biodiversity, tested for purity and efficacy. Wellness that respects you and the planet.
home.shopText: Take Sensória home. Discover our natural products in the official online store.

experiences.title: Choose your journey
experiences.description: Every experience includes a tasting of teas and specialty coffee, aromatherapy, music therapy, the Grounding Ritual and therapists certified to the Sensória standard.

units.title: Where to find us
units.description: Five addresses between Rio de Janeiro and Niterói, ready to welcome you.

about.title: We bring the best of nature into your everyday life
about.intro: For 24 years we have been a team passionate about what we do, bringing nature into your day in a practical and effective way, helping to improve your health, beauty and well-being.
about.commitmentText: At Sensória Spa, our commitment goes beyond excellence in well-being. We use only natural ingredients in all our formulations of cosmetics, food, supplements and hygiene products. We are fully vegan, with natural, eco-friendly and cruelty-free formulas.
about.commitmentText2: We believe in being a transforming agent in society — with Sensória University, which empowers people through knowledge, and the Sensória Family project, which supports mothers in generating income from home.

faith.title: Faith and Family
faith.text: Faith and family as the pillars of a happy and prosperous life.

ethics.title: Ethics and Learning
ethics.text: Integrity, transparency and a continuous pursuit of knowledge.

work.title: Work and Discipline
work.text: Smart work and discipline as the path to our dreams.

responsibility.title: Personal Responsibility
responsibility.text: Everyone with the power to create their own opportunities.

team.title: Team Spirit
team.text: Together we are stronger and achieve extraordinary results.

about.sensorialText: Through aroma, relaxing music and soft lighting, we create the perfect environment for your total relaxation.
about.productsText: Over the years we have developed exclusive natural cosmetic formulations and a complete line of essential and vegetable oils for the demands of modern life.

respire.title: Respire, Inspire
respire.text: Room fragrances inspired by Rio de Janeiro's landmarks.

amazonia.title: Amazônia
amazonia.text: Products with the finest raw materials from the planet's greatest biodiversity.

aromacologia.title: Aromacology
aromacologia.text: The influence of aromas on emotions, for well-being and nourished skin.

skincare.title: Skincare
skincare.text: A complete, effective skincare line — natural and vegan.

tastes.title: Tastes
tastes.text: Specialty coffees and teas & infusions with a touch of essential oils.

faq.title: How we can help
faq.description: Still have questions? Talk to us on WhatsApp.

0.a: Booking is done via WhatsApp or the contact form on this site. Choose the experience and location you want, and our team confirms the best time for you.

1.q: What is included in each experience?
1.a: Every Journey and Therapy includes a tasting of natural teas and specialty coffee, aromatherapy with Sensória essential oils, music therapy, the Grounding Ritual, natural creams and synergies, and therapists certified to the Sensória standard.

2.q: Can I enjoy an experience as a couple?
2.a: Yes. Most Journeys have individual and couple pricing — perfect to gift or share the moment with someone you love.

3.a: We offer the Sensória Gift Card: you choose the session and we take care of the rest. It's a gift that stays in the memory. Request it on WhatsApp.

4.a: Yes. We are fully vegan, with natural, eco-friendly and cruelty-free formulations, developed with selected raw materials from our biodiversity.

5.a: We are in five addresses: Icaraí (Niterói), Ipanema, Leblon, Península (Barra da Tijuca) and Barra – Hotel Venit. See addresses and hours on the Locations page.

6.q: What is the booking and cancellation policy?
6.a: We recommend booking in advance to secure your time and location. For rescheduling and cancellations, contact our team on WhatsApp as early as possible.

7.a: It's the ritual foot bath that opens every Sensória Journey and Therapy: warm water with therapeutic salts (whole and Epsom), chamomile and an exclusive essential oil, followed by foot reflexology and calf massage. It brings deep relaxation, energetic cleansing and prepares body and mind for the experience. It lasts 10 to 15 minutes.

grounding.title: Grounding Ritual
grounding.subtitle: The ritual that opens your experience
grounding.intro: A ritual grounding foot bath that opens every Sensória Journey and Therapy — the first moment of connection and deep relaxation.

points.0: Warm water with therapeutic salts (whole and Epsom) and chamomile
points.1: Aromatherapy with an exclusive Sensória essential oil
points.3: Energetic cleansing: releases tension and prepares body and mind

grounding.aria: Learn more about the Grounding Ritual

venit.text: Complete experience packages at our spa inside Hotel Venit, in Barra — with complimentary parking and cuisine by Matera Restaurant.
